amendment_scope: Physical DuckDB representation and uniqueness verification only; market, timing, event, hash, feature, target, and model semantics are unchanged.

inheritance.rule: All v1 and v2 logical evidence requirements remain binding. This amendment replaces only the physical event-link and typed-table layout for v3 runs.

compact_event_link.message_id_rule: Recompute from run ID, stream, connection ID, sequence number, and hexadecimal raw-payload SHA-256 during every replay audit. Retain first, last, and manifest message identities in the hash-bound frame row.
compact_event_link.event_identity_rule: Event, transaction, and update identifiers remain in the exact wire frame and the applicable typed row and are checked during replay audit.
compact_event_link.binary_digest_rule: Store exactly 32 digest bytes; convert to lowercase hexadecimal only at canonical-hash and report boundaries.

typed_storage.reason: Frame and message coordinates are generated by the single writer. Persistent ART indexes add write amplification but cannot replace a full raw-to-typed replay audit.

uniqueness_and_completeness.append_precondition: The run frame count must equal the new frame index and the writer lane sequence must be contiguous before insertion.
uniqueness_and_completeness.duplicate_prevention: One writer derives every frame and message coordinate once and commits the frame, link rows, typed rows, lane state, segment state, and run counters atomically.
uniqueness_and_completeness.audit_requirement: A run cannot qualify unless a fresh-process read-only replay proves exactly one ordered event link for every raw message, exactly one matching typed row, no unexpected typed rows, a complete lane terminal state, and matching frame and run counters.
uniqueness_and_completeness.duplicate_or_missing_row_action: Fail the audit, invalidate qualification, and authorize no feature or model consumption.

non_claims: The storage optimization is not predictive or financial evidence.
The measured memory reduction is not a guaranteed on-disk reduction.
No model, edge, profitability, ROI, leverage, paper, testnet, or live-trading authority is granted.
